description: Mapping for upstream ship data from data.stfc.space: summary-ship.json, ships/{id}.json, translations-ships.json, and ship_id_registry.json.

id.description: Ship hull id as used by data.stfc.space and ship detail files.
Hull id; primary key for this upstream ship.

loca_id.description: Localization id that resolves to the ship name via translations-ships.json.

rarity.description: Upstream rarity label (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, etc.).

grade.description: Upstream ship grade / tier group (1–5); not directly used in combat.

max_tier.description: Maximum ship tier supported by upstream data.

max_level.description: Maximum ship level for this hull in upstream data.

hull_type.description: Numeric hull type used by normalize_stfcspace_ships.mjs to derive ship_class (battleship, interceptor, explorer, survey, etc.).

id.description: Same hull id as in ship_summary.id.

max_tier.description: Max tier for this hull according to detail file.

rarity.description: Copy of rarity; may duplicate summary-ship.json.

grade.description: Copy of grade; may duplicate summary-ship.json.

tiers.description: Per-tier component layout and buffs for this ship. Each tier entry contains components and tier-specific buffs.

levels.description: Per-level upstream shield and health scaling for this hull.

ability.description: Upstream hull ability/buff data (id, value_is_percentage, values[]). Not currently used directly by the simulator.

tier.description: Ship tier number for this component layout.

buffs.description: Tier-level buffs such as cargo/protected; not all fields are mapped into combat.

cargo.description: Cargo capacity bonus at this tier (upstream units).

protected.description: Protected cargo at this tier (upstream units).

components.description: Components (warp, impulse, shield, armor, cargo, weapons, etc.) installed at this tier.

id.description: Component id within upstream data; not globally unique across ships.
Component id as used by data.stfc.space.

loca_id.description: Localization id for this component name; resolved via translations-ships.json.

data.description: Component stats; structure depends on tag.

tag.description: Logical component type (Warp, Impulse, Armor, Shield, Cargo, Weapon, Sensor, Deflector, Special, etc.).

accuracy.description: Weapon accuracy used by normalize_stfcspace_ships.mjs when tag indicates a weapon.

penetration.description: Weapon penetration; contributes to armor_piercing in normalization.

modulation.description: Weapon modulation; contributes to shield_piercing in normalization.

minimum_damage.description: Minimum weapon damage per shot used to derive average attack.

maximum_damage.description: Maximum weapon damage per shot used to derive average attack.

crit_chance.description: Critical hit chance for this weapon (0–1).

hp.description: Component hit points, used as shield_health or hull_health depending on tag.

mitigation.description: Shield mitigation/absorption factor for shield components.

shield.description: Upstream scaling factor for shield health at this level; used when normalizing into extended ship stats.

health.description: Upstream scaling factor for hull health at this level; used when normalizing into extended ship stats.

relations.description: summary-ship.json id matches ships/{id}.json id for each hull.
ship_summary.loca_id resolves to translation entry with key=ship_name for the ship's display name.
ship_id_registry.json maps upstream hull_id to Kobayashi ship id/slug used in ships_extended.

normalization_targets.description: normalize_stfcspace_ships.mjs uses summary-ship.json to seed the canonical ship index.
normalize_stfcspace_ships.mjs derives ShipRecord attack/defense stats from a chosen tier's components and stats.
src/bin/normalize_data_stfc_space.rs and related tooling normalize ship detail and level data into ships_extended tier/level schema.
